title: The Beginning of the End
summary: Chapter 30 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Beginning of the End. Theme: The end starts before anyone recognizes it.
sceneDescription: Chapter 30 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using rain-softened window light, empty road, fading leaves. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
